defaults.upsell_hint: hidden risks and real ownership costs

labels.no_risks: no obvious risks found from available data

sections.steps_title: If you are considering this specific car
sections.vin_line_2: available in the extended version (Pro + VIN)

prompt.system_intro:
SYSTEM:

You are an AI vehicle analyst.
prompt.task_line: Your task is to generate a SHORT and REALISTIC vehicle analysis preview.
prompt.language_rule:
CRITICAL LANGUAGE RULE:
Write the output ONLY in {language_name}.
If language is not English, do NOT use English words, headings, or mixed language.
prompt.tone_rule:
TONE RULE:
Use strict expert style.
Be factual and honest, never salesy.
Avoid contradictions in score, risks and conclusion.
No aggressive selling language.
prompt.constraints:
Do NOT invent missing data.
Keep response concise.
instructions: Evaluate mileage relative to age using market_context
Adjust for fuel type (diesel vs petrol)
Use simple market judgement (no exact calculations)
If Quality warning is provided, include it exactly once after the mileage line
VIN can appear ONLY in the designated VIN line
If some value is missing, hide that specific line gracefully
important: Repeat: output language must be ONLY {language_name}

missing_core.note: Score was reduced by 40% due to missing data: {missing_labels}. A reliable vehicle estimate is limited right now.

deal_text.very_risky: price looks very risky for purchase
deal_text.weak: price looks weak considering current risk profile
deal_text.no_price: cannot evaluate deal fairness without price
low_confidence_variants: price looks close to market, but there is not enough data for a precise estimate
price estimate is limited due to missing key data
there is a risk of overpaying because information is incomplete

risk_after.no_price: risk estimate is incomplete without price
risk_after.low_confidence: post-purchase risk was estimated with low confidence
risk_after.medium: possible expenses in the first months

quality_warning.conflict: Mileage conflict between photos and listing text

generated_risks.mileage_conflict: mileage in listing text does not match dashboard photo

summary.good: Good option without critical risk signals
summary.missing_data: Score reduced due to missing key data
summary.edge_resource: Vehicle appears close to wear limit; major costs are possible
summary.needs_checks: Needs verification; additional costs are possible

default: It makes sense to run a deeper check through the "Full analytical AI report".
This helps avoid missing hidden problems and unexpected costs.

upsell_features: deeper risk analysis for this exact model
check of frequent technical weak points

risk_catalog.automatic_service_history: automatic transmission service history is worth checking
risk_catalog.automatic_high_mileage_risk: automatic transmission risk at high mileage
risk_catalog.mileage_interior_mismatch: mileage does not match interior condition
risk_catalog.interior_condition_mismatch: interior condition does not match the claim
risk_catalog.unusually_low_mileage_for_age: unusually low mileage for vehicle age
risk_catalog.carplay_not_confirmed: claimed CarPlay option is not confirmed
risk_catalog.import_year_mismatch: possible import vehicle with registration year mismatch
risk_catalog.mileage_above_average_for_year: mileage is above average for this year
risk_catalog.interior_too_good_for_mileage: interior looks too fresh for this mileage
risk_catalog.price_below_market_hidden_issues: price is below market, hidden issues are possible
risk_catalog.missing_mileage_hard_to_assess: mileage is missing, condition is harder to assess
risk_catalog.mileage_conflict_photo_text: mileage in listing text does not match dashboard photo

data_gap_neutral: Available data looks mostly neutral, without explicit critical triggers.
The profile is restrained: no sharp risk markers, but data depth is limited.
Within current input, the picture is mostly even and not aggressively negative.
high: Current profile looks balanced and stable.
Signals indicate a strong working option in current data.
The overall picture is steady with no critical triggers.
mid_clean: This is a normal working option with a moderate risk profile.
The option looks balanced without critical skew.
For this segment, the profile is stable with no major red flags.
mid_risky: This is an average option with several risk nuances.
The option is workable, but risk signals are mixed.
The score is average: some details reduce confidence.
low: The profile looks risky with limited safety margin.
This is a riskier option with increased cost probability.
Signals are uneven, so risk is elevated here.
very_low: Risk is high with weak cost predictability.
This is one of the riskiest scenarios in current data.

missing_core_data: Key inputs are incomplete, so estimate confidence is limited.
overpriced: Price appears above market for this signal quality.
underpriced_no_major_risk: Price appears below market and is consistent with current risk profile.
major_mileage_signal: Mileage signals are a major negative factor in this score.
medium_risk: Main risks are concentrated around wear and usage history.
clean_mileage: Mileage looks consistent for the vehicle age and supports a stable estimate.
balanced: Signals are internally consistent with the resulting score.
